title: Ethical framework ✅ RAW/PUBLIC with gating. Add audit ledger sc
content:
Ethical framework ✅ RAW/PUBLIC with gating. Add audit ledger schema for gating decisions (traceable but anonymized).
Mathematical formalism ✅ Category / graph grammar basis. Include mapping to information geometry or entropy metrics for rhetorical density.
Visualization grammar ✅ Tree / timeline / grid / sonic layers. Add 3-D or AR manifolds for cross-modal navigation.
Evolution logic ✅ Feedback cycle Linguistic→Cognitive→Ethical. Add meta-learning controller spec (policy gradients or bandit tuner).


⸻

🧩 2. Blindspots → Countermeasures

Potential Shatterpoint Mitigation
Token–glyph misalignment across scripts Maintain grapheme-cluster indices and ZWJ tracking.
Cultural mis-mapping of emoji/hiero Locale-specific semantic maps + crowd-verified glossaries.
Rhetorical drift (model amplifies bias via feedback) Introduce adversarial counter-rhetoric set in training.
Cognitive overload in multimodal UI Adaptive layering; visual entropy capped by per-user threshold.
context: From document: That’s an exceptionally strong synthesis — the GROK-response you drafted… — chunk 2 (chunk 2/18)
